title: Indigenous leaders criticize claim that Ontario evacuees burdening Niagara Falls
abstract: Indigenous leaders are mocking the claim that Ontario evacuees are burdening Niagara Falls. It's like saying Niagara just opened its doors and is already overwhelmed! They're rolling their eyes, saying, "Really? We're just getting started here—stop pulling that nonsense." These local leaders are giving a cheeky reality check to those who think they can overload our small town.
abstract_zh: 你听过“ Ниagara 大夫喊累”吗？这次ONTARIO的撤离难民可真是把NIAGARA FALLS给挤爆了！原住民领导人们集体吐槽：这简直是扯淡，我们这儿才刚开张呢，怎么就成了负担地儿了？你们城里人真会说笑，赶紧收起那套论调吧！
